Get elevation from the USGS Elevation Point Query Service

Source: R/get_usgs_elev.R
get_usgs_elev.Rd

Queries the USGS Elevation Point Query Service for one or more latitude and longitude pairs. Coordinates are always interpreted as WGS84 (WKID 4326).

Usage

get_usgs_elev(latitude, longitude, units = c("Meters", "Feet"))

Arguments

latitude, longitude

Numeric vectors of latitude and longitude in decimal degrees.

units

Unit for the returned elevation. Must be either "Meters" or "Feet". Defaults to "Meters".

Value

A numeric vector of elevations in the requested units, with one element for each input coordinate pair.
